summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that APH is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $139.81. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 88.9%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $154.40 and a significant trendline confluence around $151.67 (formed by 4 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
